scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @fintrack/shared && npm run dev -w apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @fintrack/shared && npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build -w @fintrack/shared && npm run start -w apps/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fintrack/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @fintrack/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/mobile
